items.text: Discuss and consider a recommendation to the Town Council on an preliminary plat application for a 82.99 acre parcel generally located west of Naylor Road, across from

Potter Shop Road to Naylor Road excepting the Prairie House and the old landscape business. The property is currently vacant and zoned Agricultural. The request would comply with the Town’s Comprehensive Plan and allow for the site to be developed for commercial uses. This rezoning is the first step in the development process which will include a preliminary plat and final plat approvals prior to any new structures being

The property is currently vacant and zoned Agricultural. The request would comply with the Town’s Comprehensive Plan and allow for the site to be developed for a single residential building lot. This rezoning is the first step in the development process which will include platting the site prior to any new structures being constructed.

sfr_items.text: Discuss and consider a recommendation to the Town Council on an preliminary plat application for a 82.99 acre parcel generally located west of Naylor Road, across from

The property is currently vacant and zoned Agricultural. The request would comply with the Town’s Comprehensive Plan and allow for the site to be developed for a single residential building lot. This rezoning is the first step in the development process which will include platting the site prior to any new structures being constructed.

items.text: Commissioner Svendsen made a motion to recommend approval of the final plat as presented, with the condition that filing information for all easements dedicated by separate instrument be added to the plat prior to recordation with the Johnson County Clerk’s Office, in accordance with Section 154.025(C)(11) of the Subdivision Ordinance. Commissioner [FAILED]
Future Land Use Plan: The Future Land Use Plan shows this property to be located in the Medium-Density

Residential District, which is intended to provide areas for detached single-family homes on traditionally sized lots. Given that this property is located within an existing manufactured home subdivision, the proposed SUP request is considered compatible with the Future Land Use Plan. [APPROVED]
Cleburne, TX 76033 Future Land Use Map
